content:
I've been doing a bit of work with roc, both writing roc code, and doing limited work on the compiler, but I'm in no way claiming to be an expert in either of those topics :laughing:. If anyone wants to work synchronously and do some pair programming on either of those let me know! I feel like I learn better when I'm working with other people.

@Logan Lowder, I saw your post earlier about this, as well!
